file.content:
apiVersion: postgresql.cnpg.io/v1
kind: Cluster
metadata:
  name: postgres-test
  namespace: databases
spec:
  instances: 1

  # PostgreSQL configuration
  postgresql:
    parameters:
      max_connections: "100"
      shared_buffers: "256MB"

  # Storage configuration
  storage:
    size: 1Gi
    storageClass: standard

  # Resource limits
  resources:
    requests:
      memory: "512Mi"
      cpu: "500m"
    limits:
      memory: "1Gi"
      cpu: "1000m"

  # Bootstrap configuration
  bootstrap:
    initdb:
      database: app
      owner: app
      secret:
        name: postgres-app-user

  # Monitoring
  monitoring:
    enablePodMonitor: false

content.text:
Now let me update the existing cluster.yaml to meet the requirements for the alerthub database. I'll need to:
1. Change the database name to `alerthub`
2. Add proper backup configuration
3. Enable monitoring annotations for Prometheus
4. Update resource limits appropriately

input.content:
apiVersion: postgresql.cnpg.io/v1
kind: Cluster
metadata:
  name: alerthub-postgres
  namespace: databases
  annotations:
    prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
    prometheus.io/port: "9187"
spec:
  instances: 3

  # PostgreSQL configuration
  postgresql:
    parameters:
      max_connections: "200"
      shared_buffers: "512MB"
      effective_cache_size: "1536MB"
      maintenance_work_mem: "128MB"
      checkpoint_completion_target: "0.9"
      wal_buffers: "16MB"
      default_statistics_target: "100"
      random_page_cost: "1.1"
      effective_io_concurrency: "200"
      work_mem: "2621kB"
      min_wal_size: "1GB"
      max_wal_size: "4GB"

  # Storage configuration
  storage:
    size: 10Gi
    storageClass: standard

  # WAL storage (optional but recommended for performance)
  walStorage:
    size: 5Gi
    storageClass: standard

  # Resource limits
  resources:
    requests:
      memory: "2Gi"
      cpu: "1000m"
    limits:
      memory: "4Gi"
      cpu: "2000m"

  # Bootstrap configuration
  bootstrap:
    initdb:
      database: alerthub
      owner: alerthub
      secret:
        name: alerthub-postgres-user
      postInitSQL:
        - CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_stat_statements;
        - CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;

  # Monitoring configuration
  monitoring:
    enablePodMonitor: true
    customQueriesConfigMap:
      - name: alerthub-postgres-monitoring
        key: custom-queries.yaml

  # Backup configuration
  backup:
    barmanObjectStore:
      destinationPath: s3://postgresql-backups/alerthub
      s3Credentials:
        accessKeyId:
          name: backup-storage-creds
          key: ACCESS_KEY_ID
        secretAccessKey:
          name: backup-storage-creds
          key: ACCESS_SECRET_KEY
      wal:
        compression: gzip
        maxParallel: 2
      data:
        compression: gzip
        immediateCheckpoint: true
        jobs: 2
    retentionPolicy: "30d"

  # High availability configuration
  primaryUpdateStrategy: unsupervised
  primaryUpdateMethod: switchover

  # Affinity rules for high availability
  affinity:
    enablePodAntiAffinity: true
    topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
    podAntiAffinityType: preferred

  # Health check configuration
  startDelay: 300
  stopDelay: 300
  switchoverDelay: 60

tool_use_result.content:
apiVersion: postgresql.cnpg.io/v1
kind: Cluster
metadata:
  name: alerthub-postgres
  namespace: databases
  annotations:
    prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
    prometheus.io/port: "9187"
spec:
  instances: 3

  # PostgreSQL configuration
  postgresql:
    parameters:
      max_connections: "200"
      shared_buffers: "512MB"
      effective_cache_size: "1536MB"
      maintenance_work_mem: "128MB"
      checkpoint_completion_target: "0.9"
      wal_buffers: "16MB"
      default_statistics_target: "100"
      random_page_cost: "1.1"
      effective_io_concurrency: "200"
      work_mem: "2621kB"
      min_wal_size: "1GB"
      max_wal_size: "4GB"

  # Storage configuration
  storage:
    size: 10Gi
    storageClass: standard

  # WAL storage (optional but recommended for performance)
  walStorage:
    size: 5Gi
    storageClass: standard

  # Resource limits
  resources:
    requests:
      memory: "2Gi"
      cpu: "1000m"
    limits:
      memory: "4Gi"
      cpu: "2000m"

  # Bootstrap configuration
  bootstrap:
    initdb:
      database: alerthub
      owner: alerthub
      secret:
        name: alerthub-postgres-user
      postInitSQL:
        - CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_stat_statements;
        - CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;

  # Monitoring configuration
  monitoring:
    enablePodMonitor: true
    customQueriesConfigMap:
      - name: alerthub-postgres-monitoring
        key: custom-queries.yaml

  # Backup configuration
  backup:
    barmanObjectStore:
      destinationPath: s3://postgresql-backups/alerthub
      s3Credentials:
        accessKeyId:
          name: backup-storage-creds
          key: ACCESS_KEY_ID
        secretAccessKey:
          name: backup-storage-creds
          key: ACCESS_SECRET_KEY
      wal:
        compression: gzip
        maxParallel: 2
      data:
        compression: gzip
        immediateCheckpoint: true
        jobs: 2
    retentionPolicy: "30d"

  # High availability configuration
  primaryUpdateStrategy: unsupervised
  primaryUpdateMethod: switchover

  # Affinity rules for high availability
  affinity:
    enablePodAntiAffinity: true
    topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
    podAntiAffinityType: preferred

  # Health check configuration
  startDelay: 300
  stopDelay: 300
  switchoverDelay: 60
